title: 2023年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検3級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you need something?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, is Mr. Williams here?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I think he's in the library.

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Thanks, I'll look for him there.
questions.explanation: 「図書館にいると思う」に2の「ありがとう、そこで探す」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お気に入りの本」→無関係。2「そこで探す」→正解。3「机の上」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Are you going home now, Jane?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I still have some work to do.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want any help?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: No, I wasn't at the office.
questions.explanation: 「手伝おうか？」に2の「すぐ終わる」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「オフィスにいなかった」→無関係。2「すぐ終わる」→正解。3「見つからない」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What will the music club do for the school festival?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We'll sing some Spanish songs.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you practicing a lot?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Yes, it's next to my radio.
questions.explanation: 「たくさん練習してる？」に1の「毎日昼食後に」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「毎日昼食後」→正解。2「ラジオの隣」→無関係。3「前に行った」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where are the ninth-grade students today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: They're on a school trip.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh. Where did they go?

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: On a hike in the mountains.
questions.explanation: 「どこへ行った？」に1の「山にハイキング」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「山にハイキング」→正解。2「教室」→遠足中。3「昨日の会議」→今日の話。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, I'm hungry.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I just ordered a pizza.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. When will it arrive?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ届く？」に1の「20分くらい」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「20分くらい」→正解。2「マッシュルームとチーズ」→種類。3「町のレストランから」→場所。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. Could you help me?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where is the hospital?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「病院はどこ？」に3の「すぐそこです」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「医者に行くべき」→場所を聞いてる。2「それは残念」→共感でない。3「すぐそこ」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are you doing tomorrow?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I have a basketball game.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. I hope your team wins.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「チームが勝つといいね」に3の「勝てると思う」が自然。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「あなたの番」→無関係。2「聞いた」→不自然。3「勝てると思う」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you have any plans this weekend?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I want to go to the art museum.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go together.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「一緒に行こう」に3の「楽しそう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「水曜日」→週末の話。2「仕事中」→不自然。3「楽しそう」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: You look happy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm excited about our P.E. class.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why is that?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜ？」に2の「今日野球をするから」が体育の理由として適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「数学のテスト」→体育の話。2「野球をするから」→正解。3「ハンバーガーが好き」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, I had a science test today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How was it?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I thought it was difficult.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「難しかった」に3の「きっとうまくいったよ」が励まし。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「暖かいといいな」→無関係。2「後で探す」→無関係。3「うまくいったはず」→正解。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Who did you go shopping with?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Kate. She bought a bag, and I got a pair of gloves.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you look for soccer shoes, too?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not today.

questions.question: What did the boy buy today?
questions.explanation: 「手袋を買った」。
highlights: I got a pair of gloves
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「バッグ」→ケイトが買った。2「手袋」→正解。3「サッカーボール」→言及なし。4「靴」→探さなかった。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you wash the dishes, Bill?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I've got a lot of homework, Mom. Can Patty or Dad do them?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: They're busy, too, and it's your turn.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: All right.

questions.question: Who will wash the dishes?
questions.explanation: 「わかった」→ビルがやる。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ビル」→正解。2「母」→頼んだ側。3「父」→忙しい。4「パティ」→忙しい。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Sally. This is Ben's father. Is Ben at your house?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, we're doing our math homework.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can you tell him to come home by six?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure.

questions.question: What does Ben's father want Ben to do?
questions.explanation: 「6時までに帰ってきてと伝えて」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「6時までに帰る」→正解。2「サリーの父に電話」→言及なし。3「教科書を返す」→言及なし。4「宿題を手伝う」→一緒にやってる。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, can you help me with this box? I can't move it by myself.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where do you want to put it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Outside, by my bike.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure.

questions.question: What does the girl want to do?
questions.explanation: 「この箱を動かすのを手伝って」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車を買う」→言及なし。2「箱を動かす」→正解。3「自転車に乗る」→置き場所。4「本を探す」→箱。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello, this is Mike. Is Karen home?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sorry, she's out now. Can I take a message?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: She left her pencil case in the art room. The teacher has it.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you. I'll tell her.

questions.question: Where did Karen leave her pencil case?
questions.explanation: 「美術室に筆箱を忘れた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自分の部屋」→美術室。2「美術室」→正解。3「男の子の家」→言及なし。4「先生の家」→先生が持っている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why do you always have that camera, Bob?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I like taking photos.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you take one of my dog?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure.

questions.question: What is Bob's hobby?
questions.explanation: 「写真を撮るのが好き」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「犬の散歩」→女性の犬。2「動物の本」→言及なし。3「カメラ収集」→撮るのが好き。4「写真撮影」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. I bought this TV last week, but it doesn't work.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you please give me my money back?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'll ask my manager.

questions.question: What is the woman's problem?
questions.explanation: 「テレビが動かない」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今日仕事」→言及なし。2「お金が見つからない」→返金要求。3「テレビが壊れてる」→正解。4「テレビがうるさい」→動かない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Luke, when will you get home from school today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Classes end at four, but I have a basketball game until six.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: So, you'll be home by seven?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes.

questions.question: When do Luke's classes end?
questions.explanation: 「授業は4時に終わる」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「4時」→正解。2「5時」→言及なし。3「6時」→バスケ終了。4「7時」→帰宅時間。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I love this red jacket! It's so cute.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That blue one is cheaper. It looks warmer, too.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: But I really want this red one.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK.

questions.question: Why does the woman like the red jacket?
questions.explanation: 「かわいい！」と言っている。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「かわいい」→正解。2「暖かい」→青の方。3「安い」→青の方が安い。4「長い」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I saw you this morning. You were riding a bicycle.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Where were you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: In my husband's car. He drives me to work every day.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I ride my bike or walk to work.

questions.question: How does the woman go to work?
questions.explanation: 「夫が毎日車で送ってくれる」。
highlights: He drives me to work every day
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「電車」→言及なし。2「自転車」→男性。3「車」→正解。4「徒歩」→男性の選択肢。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Robert is learning to cook. He watches a cooking program on TV every Tuesday, and on Wednesdays he takes a cooking class after work. He makes dinner for his family on Fridays.

questions.question: When does Robert take a cooking class?
questions.explanation: 「水曜日に料理教室に通う」。
highlights: on Wednesdays he takes a cooking class
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「火曜」→テレビ。2「水曜」→正解。3「木曜」→言及なし。4「金曜」→家族に作る。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Riverside Museum. Please follow me for a free tour of our main attractions. Today, we have a special show about the pyramids in Egypt on the second floor. This way, please.

questions.question: Who is talking?
questions.explanation: 博物館で案内している→ガイド。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「学生」→案内してる。2「音楽家」→博物館。3「店員」→博物館。4「博物館ガイド」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I usually take the bus to school, but this morning, I got up late. I asked Dad to drive me to school, but he had to go to work. So I borrowed my brother's bike.

questions.question: How did the girl get to school this morning?
questions.explanation: 「兄の自転車を借りた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車」→正解。2「バス」→普段。3「父が送った」→仕事。4「兄が送った」→自転車を借りた。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Peter had to write a report about Japanese temples for his history class. He couldn't find any good books at the library, so he looked on the Internet. He found lots of useful information there.

questions.question: How did Peter learn about Japanese temples?
questions.explanation: 「インターネットで調べた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「先生に聞いた」→言及なし。2「日本を訪問」→言及なし。3「本を読んだ」→見つからなかった。4「ネットで調べた」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Brian wanted to go hiking today, but it started to rain. He decided to go and see a movie instead. At the theater, he bought popcorn and a drink. He had a relaxing afternoon.

questions.question: What did Brian do today?
questions.explanation: 「映画を見に行った」。
highlights: He decided to go and see a movie
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「映画」→正解。2「ハイキング」→雨で中止。3「家でポップコーン」→映画館で買った。4「レストラン」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I enjoy spending time alone. In the mornings, I drink tea and read the news. After dinner, I like to jog in the park.

questions.question: What does the man like to do after dinner?
questions.explanation: 「夕食後は公園でジョギング」。
highlights: After dinner, I like to jog in the park
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「お茶」→朝。2「デザート」→言及なし。3「ジョギング」→正解。4「ニュースを読む」→朝。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm a doctor. One of the other doctors at my hospital was sick today, so I was very busy. I usually finish at 6:30, but today I had to work until 8:30.

questions.question: What happened today?
questions.explanation: 「今日は8:30まで働かないといけなかった」→遅くまで働いた。
highlights: today I had to work until 8:30
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新しい医者」→病気で休み。2「遅くまで働いた」→正解。3「女性が病気」→他の医者。4「病院が早く閉まった」→遅くまで。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's Saturday today. I don't have any homework, so I'll go to the park. My friend Rob and I will go skating there. Then I'll have lunch with my dad at home.

questions.question: What is the boy going to do in the park?
questions.explanation: 「友達のロブとスケートする」。
highlights: Rob and I will go skating there
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昼食」→家で。2「宿題」→ない。3「父とゲーム」→ロブと。4「友達とスケート」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Simon makes lunch every day. He made a ham sandwich on Monday and tuna salad yesterday. Today, he'll make beef soup.

questions.question: What is Simon going to make for lunch today?
questions.explanation: 「今日はビーフスープを作る」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ビーフスープ」→正解。2「ツナサラダ」→昨日。3「ハムサンド」→月曜。4「チキンサンド」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When Michael got home last night, he couldn't find his house key. It wasn't in his bag or in his car. Finally, he went back to his office and found it on his desk.

questions.question: Where did Michael find his key?
choices: On a chair in his house.
On his desk in his office.
questions.explanation: 「オフィスの机の上で見つけた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カバン」→なかった。2「車」→なかった。3「家の椅子」→言及なし。4「オフィスの机」→正解。
